column8: EA TGQ DDraw pixel-format query (IDirectDrawSurface7 GetPixelFormat + caps mask); port replaces entire TGQ stack with IMFSourceReader. Annotation-only at td5_fmv.c:1004
EA TGQ video-resource teardown (frees param_1[0x191..0x196,400], releases DDraw surfaces at +0x1c/+0x20/+0x24); port uses IMFSourceReader release path. Annotation-only at td5_fmv.c:1005
EA TGQ DDraw 32bpp surface creation (DDSURFACEDESC2 0x6c bytes, caps 0x1007 + 0x80, QueryInterface IID_IDirectDrawSurface7); port has no DDraw surface, uses D3D11 via Media Foundation
EA TGQ frame decoder dispatch (types 1-7: palette/delta/quant/MC), calls ParseVideoFrameHeader+ComputeBlitGeometry+Decode*Block* + DDraw Lock/Unlock; port uses IMFSourceReader frame decode
EA TGQ JPEG-style quant table builder ((100-q)*0x16/100+8 luma, (100-q)*0x32/100+10 chroma, writes 64 entries to DAT_004d3820 from DAT_0047e2d8); replaced by Media Foundation pipeline
